title: NofoIc
description: A Notice of Funding Opportunity Information Collection (NOFO IC) instance: one funding opportunity plus its projects, composed from the federal Standard Data Elements.

id.description: Opportunity id (not part of the IC; derived if absent)

status.description: Opportunity status (not part of the IC)

createdDate.description: Record creation timestamp (not part of the IC)

lastModifiedDate.description: Record last-modified timestamp (not part of the IC)
